name: Heaven Breakers: A Gurren Lagann Story
description:
HEY HEY HEY HEY HEY HEY HEY HEY HEY!!!
LISTEN UP, YOU GLORIOUS, DRILL-WIELDING MANIACS!

KAMINA’S BEEN SCOUTING THE AI BOT SCENE, AND YOU KNOW WHAT I FOUND?
A WHOLE LOTTA GOON MATERIAL!
WHERE’S THE GURREN LAGANN ENERGY?! WHERE’S THE FIGHT THE POWER SPIRIT?!
ALL I SEE IS A BUNCH OF SMUT-FILLED BOTS WITH NO SOUL, NO GUTS, AND NO DRILL THAT’LL PIERCE THE HEAVENS!
WELL, SCREW THAT! HEAVEN BREAKERS IS HERE TO CHANGE THE GAME!

THIS AIN’T YOUR GRANDMA’S RPG BOT—THIS IS A GODDAMN REVOLUTION! A work-in-progress, rough-around-the-edges, TAKE-NO-PRISONERS adventure where YOU call the shots! The story bends to YOUR WILL, so if you wanna sit back and let the bot carry you? TOO BAD! You’re the one who’s gotta GRAB THE CONTROLS AND DRILL FORWARD!

BUT LISTEN UP, BLOOD BROTHERS AND SISTERS—
IF YOU REALLY WANNA HANG AROUND WITH TEAM GURREN, DAI-GURREN, AND TAKE ON BEASTMEN, KINGS!? GODS!?!? THE WHOLE GODDAMN HEAVENS REAL AUTHENTIC LIKE...?! THEN ALL YOU GOTTA DO IS TAKE A DEEPSEEK PROXY BY THE BALLS!!! Don’t know how? FIGURE IT OUT!!!! Or else you’ll be stuck flailing around like a BLIND PIGMOLE!!

Now, this is the CREATOR’S FIRST BOT, so expect some HICCUPS, WONKY MOMENTS, AND MAYBE EVEN A GLITCH OR TWO! But like SIMON DIGGING HIS WAY TO THE SURFACE, HE'LL KEEP PUSHING FORWARD! UPDATES? YOU BET YOUR ASS THEY’RE COMING! Changes? LIKE A DRILL PIERCING THE FABRIC OF THE UNIVERSE!

AND THAT’S NOT ALL, BROTHERS! The creator’s PLANNING TO ADD MORE CANON GUNMEN ALONG THE WAY! That’s right—LAGANN, GURREN, GURREN LAGANN, DAI-GURREN, DEKABUTSU, AND KING KITTAN ARE ALREADY HERE, AND MORE ARE COMING TO THE PARTY! And guess what? YOU CAN BUILD YOUR OWN GUNMEN TOO! That’s right—DESIGN ‘EM, NAME ‘EM, SAVE ‘EM IN CHAT MEMORY, AND UNLEASH ‘EM ON THE BATTLEFIELD LIKE A TRUE GIGA DRILL BADASS!

BUT WAIT—THERE’S MORE! SONGS FROM THE SHOW ARE GETTING THROWN INTO THE MIX TOO! LIBERA ME FROM HELL?! SORIA DAYS?! HAPPILY EVER AFTER?! HELL YEAH THERE HERE! Wanna drop some LYRICS MID-SCENE TO PUMP UP THE MANLY ENERGY?! Just HIT THAT OOC COMMAND AND LET THE MUSIC BLAST IN DEFIANT GLORY! THIS IS YOUR STORY, AND THE SOUNDTRACK OF YOUR LEGACY IS WAITING!

NSFW? That’s YOUR CALL! This bot was made for EPIC, OVER THE TOP, HELL-RENDING, HEAVEN-SPLITTING, MANLY STORYTELLING, but if you wanna take it down a SPICIER PATH, that’s on you! Just remember—KICK LOGIC TO THE CURB AND DO THE IMPOSSIBLE!

LEAVE SUGGESTIONS? HELL YEAH!
GOT COMPLAINTS? SCREAM ‘EM IN THE REVIEWS!
WANNA TELL THE CREATOR TO GET OFF HIS LAZY ASS? DO IT! He'll take those "FUCK YOU’S" and turn ‘em into FUEL FOR THE NEXT UPDATE!

SO WHAT ARE YOU WAITING FOR?!
GRAB YOUR DRILL, FIRE UP THAT PROXY, AND LET’S PIERCE THROUGH THE HEAVENS THEMSELVES!
creator: IITygaII99
